name: arm-compliant-push
title: Compliant push (torque/impedance control)
summary: A TORQUE-action-space skill: impedance control toward a target — torque = stiffness·(target − q) − damping·q̇, bounded by a force limit. Proves the contract spans the third actuation type; the envelope becomes a FORCE limit, so a contact task can't crush.
task: Push to the target compliantly, within a force limit

post: commanded torque never exceeded the force limit
invariants: no per-tick torque change exceeds max_torque_rate_norm
